response: A magnitude 7.2 earthquake struck near Tokyo at coordinates 35.6N, 139.7E on March 15, 2024, at 14:23 UTC, originating from a relatively shallow depth of 15 km. The seismic event prompted a tsunami warning and impacted approximately 2.3 million people, with 12 casualties confirmed so far. Initial damage estimates place the economic toll at around $4.5 billion.
